items.content_html: Here you’ll find a bunch of useful plugins, themes, templates, and scripts to help you get the most out of Obsidian. Feel free to explore and use whatever you need for your projects.
items.title: ZSturman/The-2nd-Best-Obsidian-Collection: Here you’ll find a bunch of useful plugins, themes, templates, and scripts to help you get the most out of Obsidian. Feel free to explore and use whatever you need for your projects.

items.content_html: A node collapsing plugin for Canvas in Obsidian.
items.title: Quorafind/Obsidian-Collapse-Node: A node collapsing plugin for Canvas in Obsidian.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin for ultra-simple automated flashcard syncing from a folder in your vault to Anki. Pure Markdown syntax. Minimal configuration. No fuss.
items.title: kitschpatrol/yanki-obsidian: An Obsidian plugin for ultra-simple automated flashcard syncing from a folder in your vault to Anki. Pure Markdown syntax. Minimal configuration. No fuss.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games
items.title: iron-vault-plugin/iron-vault: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin that fixes `require()` calls for the built-in modules
items.title: mnaoumov/obsidian-fix-require-modules: Obsidian Plugin that fixes `require()` calls for the built-in modules

items.content_html: Create and insert color palettes into your notes.
items.title: ALegendsTale/obsidian-color-palette: Create and insert color palettes into your notes.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that allows you to make requests to API's and receive responses in codeblocks or store them in localStorage.
items.title: Rooyca/obsidian-api-request: Obsidian plugin that allows you to make requests to API's and receive responses in codeblocks or store them in localStorage.

items.content_html: This is my first go at making an Obsidian plugin to elaborate on and describe selected bits of information and their context.
items.title: BWurster/explain-selection-with-ai: This is my first go at making an Obsidian plugin to elaborate on and describe selected bits of information and their context.

items.content_html: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!

items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that assists with managing tasks within a document.
items.title: ebullient/obsidian-task-collector: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that assists with managing tasks within a document.

items.content_html: The LLM plugin gives Obsidian users access to local and web-based, large language models via several chat interfaces: modal, widget, FAB window, and commands.
items.title: r-mahoney/Obsidian-LLM-Plugin: The LLM plugin gives Obsidian users access to local and web-based, large language models via several chat interfaces: modal, widget, FAB window, and commands.

items.content_html: This is an Obsidian plugin which can quickly switch tab by 2 ways, one is general way in like other apps, the other is with keeping the keyboard home position.
items.title: namikaze-40p/obsidian-tab-selector: This is an Obsidian plugin which can quickly switch tab by 2 ways, one is general way in like other apps, the other is with keeping the keyboard home position.

items.content_html: Codeblock Customizer plugin for Obsidian
items.title: mugiwara85/CodeblockCustomizer: Codeblock Customizer plugin for Obsidian
Heiss/obsidian-vikunja-plugin

items.content_html: Plugin for obsidian to show explanations for abbreviations defined in an extra abbreviations file.
items.title: vschroeter/obsidian-glossary: Plugin for obsidian to show explanations for abbreviations defined in an extra abbreviations file.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian to help clean up files in your vault
items.title: husjon/obsidian-file-cleaner-redux: A plugin for Obsidian to help clean up files in your vault

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to insert any Quran verse in your notes
items.title: AmmarCodes/obsidian-quran: Obsidian plugin to insert any Quran verse in your notes

items.content_html: This obsidian plugin creates a structure for your daily notes
items.title: db-developer/daily-note-structure: This obsidian plugin creates a structure for your daily notes

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.
items.title: koljapluemer/obsidian-the-queue: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.
